slides.title: What is a Component? 🧩
See it in Action
slides.content: Open `src/App.js` in your project and replace its content with:

quizData.question: What does a React component typically return?

options.text: A description of what to render (JSX)

quizData.explanation: A component returns JSX, which describes what the UI should look like. React then turns that into actual DOM elements.
